data.body: transition/reopen IN-PROCESS (pending full-suite green + commit): ported ticket-transition.sh wrapper -> rebar._commands.transition (transition_compute + transition_cli + reopen_cli) over txn.transition_core. Also ported ticket-unblock.py batch-close/newly_unblocked -> rebar.graph._unblock (engine file now a thin CLI shim re-exporting the package fns; literal 'deleted' kept for legacy static guard). Routed transition/reopen in-process in rebar._cli (_LIFECYCLE, full init). Rewired rebar.transition library fn off _run -> transition_compute (reopen delegates). Dual-run parity test test_e3_transition.py: 8 scenarios GREEN first run (not-found text+json, usage, invalid/deleted reject, no-op json quirk, 2-arg autodetect, close UNBLOCKED, dependent-unblock). Fixed test_ticket_unblock single-reduce-call mock target to new module. compact-on-close still subprocesses ticket-compact.sh (rewire when compact ported). claim still on _run (next sub-commit).
